calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-25-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Jensen for and with Mary Carpenter. Christine Ely in Propria Persona.

Mr. Jensen stated that he filed a supplemental declaration, that the third assignment was filed and that it was signed by Ms. Ely. Ms. Ely stated that she agrees with what is set out in the petition, that she has no problem with rejection of her creditor's claim, with reduction in the amount of $1,030.94 from her share and payment of $17,000.00 to inheritance funding for her assignment. Mr. Jensen, Ms. Carpenter and Ms. Ely orally amended the petition to request additional payment to inheritance funding in the amount of $17,000.00 out Ms. Ely's share. Ms. Ely waives notice of the amendment and asked to receive her funds tomorrow at Mr. Jensen's office. Mr. Jensen is to prepare something in writing/some sort of receipt as to the additional $17,000.00 payment. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition To Revoke Full Authority And Grant Limited Authority.
Off Calendar Feb-22-2013 Denied

Petition To Revoke Full Authority And Grant Limited Authority.
Off Calendar Jan-08-2013 Continued To Feb-22-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Jensen appeared by telephone for Mary Carpenter. Christine Ely in Propria Persona.

Mr. Jensen waives any defect in notice. Ms. Ely stated that she did not receive a copy of Ms. Carpenter's response, that she was not notified of the 10:30 court call appearance and that she wanted to proceed today. The Petition to Revoke Full Authority and Grant Limited Authority was continued to February 22, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for an evidentiary hearing. Mark Jensen may appear by telephone at 9:00 a.m. The Executor is to continue with full authority and the Sisters are to cooperate with each other.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.
